validation_selection.selection_basis: full validation only; full-row branch is a diagnostic negative-control path and is not deployed without final test safety

safe_switch_validation_selection.selection_basis: full validation only; train stress skipped for this tail grid to keep the policy search bounded; test remains single final evaluation

caveat: This is a bounded continuous neural dynamics blend around the Stage37/teacher floor, not latent generative rollout and not SMC. Coordinates remain dataset-local raw-frame.
